content.problemStatement:
There are two types of vaccines available: Covaxin and Covishield.

A black marketeer has XXX coins and wants to buy as many vaccines as possible. Due to the black marketing concerns, government has enforced the following policy:



ithi^{th}ith dose of Covaxin costs a+(i−1)⋅ba + (i - 1)\cdot ba+(i−1)⋅b coins for every i≥1i \geq 1i≥1.




ithi^{th}ith dose of Covishield costs c+(i−1)⋅dc + (i - 1)\cdot dc+(i−1)⋅d coins for every i≥1i \geq 1i≥1.



The values of the four parameters a,b,ca, b, ca,b,c and ddd, however isn't constant and might vary from query to query. In general the value of these four parameters for ithi^{th}ith query will be Ai,Bi,CiA_i, B_i, C_iAi​,Bi​,Ci​ and DiD_iDi​ respectively.
Let ansians_iansi​ be the maximum total quantity of vaccines the black marketeer can buy corresponding to the ithi^{th}ith query. For each query, you have to find the value of ansians_iansi​.

You will be given integers A1,B1,C1,D1,P,Q,R,S,TA_1, B_1, C_1, D_1, P, Q, R, S, TA1​,B1​,C1​,D1​,P,Q,R,S,T and MMM which will define the queries to be followed.

For i≥1i \geq 1i≥1 and i≤I−1i \leq I - 1i≤I−1:


Ai+1=(Ai+ansi⋅T) mod M+PA_{i+1} = (A_i + ans_i\cdot T) \bmod M + PAi+1​=(Ai​+ansi​⋅T)modM+P
Bi+1=(Bi+ansi⋅T) mod M+QB_{i+1} = (B_i + ans_i\cdot T) \bmod M + QBi+1​=(Bi​+ansi​⋅T)modM+Q
Ci+1=(Ci+ansi⋅T) mod M+RC_{i+1} = (C_i + ans_i\cdot T) \bmod M + RCi+1​=(Ci​+ansi​⋅T)modM+R
Di+1=(Di+ansi⋅T) mod M+SD_{i+1} = (D_i + ans_i\cdot T) \bmod M + SDi+1​=(Di​+ansi​⋅T)modM+S .
**Note:** Since the output is large, prefer using fast input-output methods.


Input Format

First line contains of input contains an integer III denoting the number of queries.
Second line of input contains five integers X,A1,B1,C1,D1X, A_1, B_1, C_1, D_1X,A1​,B1​,C1​,D1​.
Third line of input contains six integers P,Q,R,S,T,MP, Q, R, S, T, MP,Q,R,S,T,M.


Output Format
For each query output the maximum quantity of vaccines the black marketeer can buy.
